display.purpose: Page, note, folder, and dashboard titles.

headline.purpose: Brand mark and major section anchors.

title.purpose: Cards, search results, note previews, and modules.

body.purpose: Long-form note reading and normal interface text.

label.purpose: Toolbar labels, eyebrows, dense metadata, and calendar labels.

code.purpose: Inline code, fenced blocks, task IDs, and technical fragments.

shadows.name: surface-hairline
shadows.purpose: Nearly flat separation for buttons and quiet cards.

shadows.name: soft-card
shadows.purpose: Low elevation for cards and task groups.

shadows.name: command-lift
shadows.purpose: Temporary elevation for command palette and settings dialogs.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Default color, border, shadow, opacity, and transform transitions.

motion.name: palette-fade
motion.purpose: Overlay fade for command palette entry.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action button with Violet Thread fill and compact product spacing.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: var(--accent, #6b5cff); color: var(--surface, #fffdfa); border: 1px solid var(--accent, #6b5cff); border-radius: var(--radius-md, 12px); padding: 8px 12px; font: 700 14px ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background 160ms ease, transform 160ms ease, box-shadow 160ms ease; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(61, 50, 194, 0.18); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); filter: brightness(1.05); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent, #6b5cff) 32%, transparent); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Default Button
components.description: Quiet utility button for secondary actions and toolbar controls.
components.css: .ds-btn-default { background: var(--surface, #fffdfa); color: var(--ink, #27231d); border: 1px solid var(--line, #e2dccc); border-radius: var(--radius-md, 12px); padding: 8px 12px; font: 650 14px ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: border-color 160ms ease, transform 160ms ease, box-shadow 160ms ease; box-shadow: 0 1px 0 rgba(39, 35, 29, 0.08); } .ds-btn-default:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(39, 35, 29, 0.08); } .ds-btn-default:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent, #6b5cff) 28%, transparent); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Tag Chip
components.description: Washed Violet metadata chip for tags, filters, and compact task context.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: var(--radius-pill, 999px); background: var(--soft, #efecff); color: var(--accent-ink, #3d32c2); font: 700 14px ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Retrieval-first text field with warm surface and violet focus ring.
components.css: .ds-search { width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; background: var(--surface, #fffdfa); color: var(--ink, #27231d); border: 1px solid var(--line, #e2dccc); border-radius: 10px; padding: 10px 12px; font: 400 18px ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: border-color 160ms ease, box-shadow 160ms ease; } .ds-search:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--accent, #6b5cff); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent, #6b5cff) 22%, transparent); }

components.name: Content Card
components.description: Warm paper module for search results, notes, diagnostics, and dashboard groups.
components.html:
Daily note

Calm density for reading, tasks, and retrieval.
components.css: .ds-card { background: var(--surface, #fffdfa); color: var(--ink, #27231d); border: 1px solid var(--line, #e2dccc); border-radius: var(--radius-lg, 18px); padding: 20px; box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(39, 35, 29, 0.08); font: 400 15px/1.55 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card strong { display: block; font-size: 18px; line-height: 1.3; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-card p { margin: 0; color: var(--muted, #786f63); }

components.name: Command Palette Row
components.description: Keyboard navigation row with selected state carried by Washed Violet.
components.css: .ds-palette-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto; gap: 16px; align-items: center; padding: 13px 16px; background: var(--soft, #efecff); color: var(--ink, #27231d); border-radius: 12px; font: 650 15px ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-palette-row kbd { color: var(--muted, #786f63); font: 700 12px ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace; }

components.name: Task Row
components.description: Dense task row with checkbox, priority, title, and metadata.
components.html: P1Review broken links
components.css: .ds-task { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 22px 38px minmax(0, 1fr); gap: 10px; align-items: center; min-height: 48px; padding: 9px 12px; background: var(--surface, #fffdfa); color: var(--ink, #27231d); border: 1px solid var(--line, #e2dccc); border-radius: 16px; font: 650 15px ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-task-check { width: 18px; height: 18px; border: 1.5px solid var(--line, #e2dccc); border-radius: 6px; } .ds-task-priority { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 22px; border-radius: 8px; background: var(--danger, #b54747); color: var(--surface, #fffdfa); font: 800 11px ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-task-title { overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Code Block
components.description: Matte technical block that stays integrated with the reading surface.
components.css: .ds-code { overflow: auto; margin: 0; padding: 14px; border-radius: var(--radius-md, 12px); background: var(--pre, #f1eee6); color: var(--ink, #27231d); font: 400 14px/1.35 ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace; }

narrative.overview: Notes Web should feel like an operative notebook for a private vault: calm enough for long reading, precise enough for maintenance, and fast enough that retrieval feels almost physical. The interface is not neutral. It is personal-first, open source, keyboard-native, and intentionally opinionated. The system uses warm paper tones, fresh ink contrast, and a single violet thread for active states, commands, focus, and selected navigation. Density is allowed because the product is a real tool, but every dense surface must remain quiet, legible, and purposeful.
keyCharacteristics: Warm, paper-led product UI with strong reading comfort.
Restrained accent use: violet marks action, focus, selection, and command flow.
Keyboard-first affordances with visible focus and predictable states.
Personal craft made reusable through explicit tokens and rules.

rules.name: The Violet Thread Rule
rules.body: Violet is for orientation and action only: current location, command flow, focus, selected filters, and primary actions. If violet appears as ornament, remove it.

rules.name: The Warm Neutral Rule
rules.body: Use tinted neutrals for every background and text layer. Pure black and pure white are forbidden in new UI work.

rules.name: The Semantic Restraint Rule
rules.body: Red Wax, Amber Note, and Moss Mark are state colors, not category colors. Do not decorate dashboards with them.

rules.name: The Native Tool Rule
rules.body: Use the system sans for product UI. Do not introduce display fonts for labels, buttons, tables, task rows, or navigation.

rules.name: The Reading Breath Rule
rules.body: Note content earns extra line-height. Dense product modules can compress, but prose should stay comfortable.

rules.name: The Flat Until Invoked Rule
rules.body: Resting surfaces are flat. Shadows appear when an element is actionable, hovered, opened, or temporarily above the vault.

rules.name: The No Glass Rule
rules.body: Backdrop blur may support a modal mode, but glassmorphism is forbidden as a decorative default.

dos: Do keep Notes Web product-first: retrieval, reading, tasks, and diagnostics beat decorative composition.
Do use Violet Thread only for orientation, action, focus, and selected states.
Do preserve Calm Density: information-rich modules are allowed when spacing, hierarchy, and labels make them scannable.
Do design keyboard-first states for buttons, tree items, command palette rows, task menus, and filters.
Do make diagnostics feel like maintenance, not alarm: broken links and orphans should be clear without turning the page into an error wall.
Do keep personal-first choices explicit so open source users can adapt them without erasing the point of view.
donts: Don't make Notes Web look like a cold documentation wiki that makes personal notes feel impersonal.
Don't add heavy app chrome, decorative motion, unnecessary blur, or framework-like visual bulk.
Don't use generic SaaS dashboard patterns: repeated metric cards, hero-stat layouts, gradient accents, or ornamental panels.
Don't copy Obsidian's desktop app. Serve the web reading and retrieval context instead.
Don't neutralize the product until it loses its personal-first point of view.
Don't add colored side-stripe borders to new callouts, cards, list items, or alerts. Use full borders, tinted panels, icons, or title treatment.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism as decoration, pure black, or pure white in new UI work.
